title: Innovative AI Project Blending Reading, Literacy, and Design
first_prompt: I want you to serve as a partner and advisor to talk through ideas for creating a small but impactful project to get experience with using MCP, LLMs and multimodal models. I want to create a project t
summary: Irwin sought to develop a portfolio project demonstrating conceptual innovation in AI, specifically blending reading and design principles to create a functional, impactful application. The discussion initially focused on "ReadingGlass," a digital reader using ambient imagery and sound to combat distraction, but the viability was challenged by copyright and DRM issues. The conversation ultimately refined the concept into generating a dynamic, personalized "book trailer" or screensaver, which would use a book synopsis to prompt the creation of a photorealistic backdrop, thereby addressing the need for a systematic, commercially viable formula.
